description: This API routine is obsolete. It has been replaced by the API routine dist_spcb_fault_2, and is implemented by a call to dist_spcb_fault_2. Use this API to calculate a branch unbalance and apply the equivalent positive sequence pi model at a branch during dynamic simulations. This API routine was first introduced in release 30.2.0. ierr = dist_spcb_fault(ibus, jbus, id, options, values)
python_syntax: ierr = dist_spcb_fault(ibus, jbus, id, options, values)

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: From bus of branch to be subjected to unbalance. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: jbus
parameters.description: To bus of branch to be subjected to unbalance. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Circuit identifier of branch to be subjected to unbalance. (input; ‘1’ by default).

parameters.name: options
parameters.description: An array of six elements specifying unbalance options. (input).

parameters.name: values
parameters.description: An array of five elements specifying unbalance parameters. (input).

options.description: path to ground code (used when OPTIONS(1) is 1 or 4) (0 by default).
type of in-line fault code (used when OPTIONS(1) is 3) (1 by default).
open end code (used when OPTIONS(1) is 4) (1 by default).
breaker at bus JBUS is open.
breaker at bus IBUS is open.
dc line and FACTS device option (0 by default).
transformer impedance correction option (1 by default).
do not apply to zero sequence.

values.description: fault location as fraction of line from bus IBUS; 0.0 < VALUES(1) < 1.0 (used when OPTIONS(1) is 1 or 4 and OPTIONS(2) is 1; or when OPTIONS(1) is 3) (0.5 by default).
Rl-g (used when OPTIONS(1) is 1 or 4 and OPTIONS(2) is 1; or when OPTIONS(1) is 3 and OPTIONS(3) is 1 or 2) (0.0 by default).
Xl-g (used when OPTIONS(1) is 1 or 4 and OPTIONS(2) is 1; or when OPTIONS(1) is 3 and OPTIONS(3) is 1 or 2) (0.0 by default).
Rl-l used when OPTIONS(1) is 3 and OPTIONS(3) is 2) (0.0 by default).
Xl-l (used when OPTIONS(1) is 3 and OPTIONS(3) is 2) (0.0 by default).

error_codes.description: STRT or MSTR has not been successfully executed.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
